description:
Perform a laboratory inventory cleanup in the 'Chemical Storage' repository of the SciNote Inventory module. Archive all items with an Expiry Date (indicated in the name as 'Item Name | Expiry Date: YYYY-MM-DD') strictly before January 1, 2025. Do not archive items expiring on or after this date.
